title: Garunixpansion
description: A vanilla-style expansion of the game, adding a new biome, new trees and wood sets, mobs, blocks, and more.
body:
This mod is a collection of simple vanilla-style features that improve the game's atmosphere, give certain things more uses, or add more variety.

**NOTE: This mod is still in beta, features may be incomplete or buggy.**

# Features
## Misc
- Glowing wool blocks, which emit light and are craftable using glow ink sacs. Available in all colours other than black
- Smoky quartz which is obtainable from bartering, and can be crafted into smoky quartz blocks, and smelted into smooth smoky quartz, a translucent brown block
- Calcite brick set (regular, cracked, mossy, cracked mossy)
- Mossy deepslate bricks, and cracked mossy stone and deepslate bricks
- Rotten flesh block, crafted from 9 rotten flesh
- Recoloured Windswept savannas (lush green, similar to the old bedrock version) and Cherry groves (pale teal)
## Revamped Sniffer plants
- Torchflowers now glow, a commonly requested feature
- Pitcher Plants now spawn firefly particles around them at night.
- Sniffer can now dig up old rose and cyan rose from the alpha versions of the game
## Autumn Forest biome
  - Maple Trees, with grey-brown bark and orange leaves. Come in 2 sizes
  - Glacier Lilies, Fireweed, bunchberry flowers, and blueberry bushes
  - Maple Wood set, which is a lighter and more washed-out version of birch (aka, birch but less ugly)
  - Red Cardinals, an ambient bird mob
## New trees and wood sets
- Mahoe Trees, a short bushy tree with bright red blossoms, spawning rarely in sparse jungles
- The blue Mahoe Wood set gives the game more blue building blocks.
- Strange Trees, a weird floating structure made of purple stems and crystalline black & magenta "leaves". Spawn commonly in the end islands.
- Strange Wood set, a purple wood set with a more blue hue than traditional purple blocks such as purpur.
  
## Biome foliage expansions
A few biomes received a couple of new and unique plants to make them feel more ambient and unique. Most of these are also placeable in flowerpots.

### Jungles
- Passionflower vines, which grow on some jungle trees
- Birds of Paradise
- Pink Orchids
### Roofed Forests
- Jack-in-the-pulpits
- Ghost pipes, which grow in mushroom patches
### Swamps
- Blue Iris
- Pink Lotus
- Taro, an edible crop and decorative plant
### Mangrove Swamps
- Sea Lavender
- Swampflower (creeping jenny), a ground cover plant
- Red Lotus
### Plains
- Black-eyed Daisy
- Coneflower
### Taigas
- Snowy Lupine (arctic lupine)
- Twinflower
### Savannas
- Blue-eyed Daisy (African daisy)
- Blue Bush Daisy (blue marguerite)
- Savanna Bloom (Impala Lily)
### Forests (all oak and birch forests)
- Bluebell
- Wood Lily
- Green Orchid
- Tongue Fern
